properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v4 v1 v2 v1 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was glad when They said to me, Come to the House of the Lord, Standing here in Your gates again, Up to Jerusalem.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I was glad when They said to me, Come to the House of the Lord, Standing here in Your gates again, Up to Jerusalem, Up to Jerusalem, Up to Jerusalem.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jerusalem, peace, Adonai Sar Shalom, Blessing be yours, God's peace within your walls.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: City of praise, Where the tribes shout Hallelujah, We lift your voice, To the God of Israel.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: Up to Jerusalem Up to Jerusalem Up to Jerusalem. :/ Jerusalem….!!
